member.name: T:PharmacyService.Application.Services.Entities.PhrMedicineFormService
member.summary: Medicine dosage forms stored as under a tenant-specific definition.

member.name: M:PharmacyService.Application.Services.ILmsInventoryIntegrationService.RecordLmsReagentConsumptionAsync(PharmacyService.Application.Services.RecordLmsReagentConsumptionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Records cross-module intent when LMS consumes inventory-linked material (e.g. reagent batch). Extend with StockLedger / batch updates when pharmacy stock is physically shared.
